7:
WITH consumption AS (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           substr(y.Date, 1, 4) AS year,
           SUM(y.Consumption) AS total
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
    GROUP BY c.Segment, year
),
year_totals AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2012' THEN total END) AS cons2012,
           MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2013' THEN total END) AS cons2013
    FROM consumption
    GROUP BY Segment
),
percentages AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           (cons2013 - cons2012) / cons2013 * 100.0 AS pct_increase
    FROM year_totals
)
SELECT Segment,
       pct_increase,
       CASE
           WHEN pct_increase = (SELECT MAX(pct_increase) FROM percentages) THEN 'biggest'
           WHEN pct_increase = (SELECT MIN(pct_increase) FROM percentages) THEN 'lowest'
       END AS label
FROM percentages
WHERE pct_increase IS NOT NULL;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

           c.birth_date,
           d.A11 AS avg_salary
    FROM client c

    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
      AND c.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender = 'F')
),
min_avg AS (
    SELECT MIN(avg_salary) AS min_salary
    FROM oldest_females
),
selected_clients AS (
    SELECT client_id
    FROM oldest_females
    WHERE avg_salary = (SELECT min_salary FROM min_avg)
),
max_avg AS (
    SELECT MAX(d.A11) AS max_salary
    FROM client c
    JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
)
SELECT d.account_id,
       (SELECT max_salary FROM max_avg) - (SELECT min_salary FROM min_avg) AS gap
FROM disp d
JOIN selected_clients sc ON d.client_id = sc.client_id;	----- bird -----	financial
